top_signals.title: Rheinmetall pitches shipping container that can spit out swarms of attack drones
top_signals.summary: One container can hold 18 of the company’s FV-014 munitions, meant to plop out of the container by way of rocket-assisted start.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ambani set to fire starting gun on India’s largest IPO
top_signals.summary: Iran war has hit country’s equity market and disrupted what was positioned to be another record year for flotations
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: MBDA advances land version of its naval missile as European strike weapon
top_signals.summary: Europe lacks long-range strike options that provide deterrence by holding Russian assets at risk, a gap that countries are trying to patch.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Takaichi and Trump talk Indo-Pacific as Mideast crisis overshadows G7 summit
top_signals.summary: The meeting came as the grouping reaffirmed its opposition to unilateral attempts to change the status quo in the East and South China Seas and across the Taiwan Strait.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX leapfrogs Amazon to become world’s fifth-most valuable company
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk’s AI, rocket and satellite group also announces $60bn deal for AI coding app Cursor
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UK to require ID or face scan before you can make social media accounts
top_signals.summary: Opening a new social media account in the UK will soon mean proving you're over 16 with an ID upload or a facial age scan, under a government ban on under-16s taking effect in spring 2027. Security experts warn the age checks are easy to circumvent and create new data-breach risks. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Baroness Hogg has been reappointed as a non-executive member of the Office for Budget Responsibility.
top_signals.summary: Baroness Hogg has been reappointed as a non-executive member of the Office for Budget Responsibility.

top_signals.title: India Micro-Caps Defy Hazy Macro With Breakout Signal
top_signals.summary: The Bloomberg India Micro Cap Index has formed a  technical signal watched by traders.
